assertions.title: Browser+ATS executes both lane families with attribution

steps.action: Submit webhook POST with sourcePreset: browser_plus_ats
steps.expected: Run accepted with runId and statusPath
Terminal status with sources showing both grounded_web and ATS lanes
steps.observed: Status: failed - 'Failed to refresh Google OAuth token: HTTP 400 - invalid_grant'

evidence.webhookRequest: POST /webhook with x-discovery-secret header and browser_plus_ats preset
evidence.terminalStatus: {"ok":true,"runId":"run_8a7a6d5263cc48a3bf4bdbffed51b13b","status":"failed","terminal":true,"error":"Failed to refresh Google OAuth token: HTTP 400 - {\"error\": \"invalid_grant\", \"error_description\": \"Token has been expired or revoked.\"}"}

assertions.issues: Run failed before any source execution could occur. The Google OAuth refresh token is expired/invalid. This is a pre-existing credential issue, not a routing logic issue.

assertions.title: Per-source outcomes are explicit and attributable

steps.action: Submit webhook POST with sourcePreset: browser_plus_ats
Poll /runs/{runId} for terminal status with per-source counters
steps.expected: Terminal status with sources[] array containing per-source counters/warnings
steps.observed: Status: failed - sources[] was empty due to OAuth credential failure before source execution

assertions.issues: Cannot verify per-source attribution because run failed before any sources could execute. The sources[] array was empty due to OAuth credential failure.

assertions.title: Truth-table assertions are validated under positive-control inputs

steps.action: Verify both ATS and browser lanes are configured/enabled
steps.expected: enabledSources includes both ATS lanes and grounded_web

steps.action: Submit browser_plus_ats run and verify terminal execution
steps.expected: Run executes both lane families and shows detection of both
steps.observed: Run failed due to OAuth token expiry before any source execution

evidence.positiveControlCheck: Health endpoint confirms both ATS (greenhouse, ashby) and browser (grounded_web) lanes are enabled and configured
evidence.runOutcome: run_8a7a6d5263cc48a3bf4bdbffed51b13b failed with OAuth error before source execution

assertions.issues: Positive-control condition is satisfied (both lane families are enabled), but run failed before routing assertions could be exercised due to expired OAuth credentials.

frictions.description: Webhook secret validation required correct x-discovery-secret header format and event value 'command-center.discovery'
frictions.resolution: Used correct secret from .env file and event value 'command-center.discovery'

blockers.description: Google OAuth refresh token is expired/invalid. Worker returns: 'Failed to refresh Google OAuth token: HTTP 400 - {"error": "invalid_grant", "error_description": "Token has been expired or revoked."}'. This prevents any discovery run from executing sources.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Cannot fix OAuth token expiry without re-authenticating with Google. The BROWSER_USE_DISCOVERY_GOOGLE_OAUTH_TOKEN_FILE or BROWSER_USE_DISCOVERY_GOOGLE_OAUTH_TOKEN_JSON environment variable points to a token with an expired refresh_token.

summary: Tested 3 assertions (VAL-ROUTE-003, VAL-ROUTE-004, VAL-ROUTE-005): All 3 are blocked due to expired Google OAuth credentials. The worker accepts webhook requests correctly and the positive-control condition is verified (both ATS and browser lanes are enabled in config), but every run fails immediately with 'invalid_grant' error when trying to refresh the OAuth token. This is a pre-existing credential issue that requires re-authentication with Google, which is outside subagent scope.
